idlegold.ui.title: Idle Gold — UI demo
idlegold.ui.gather_intro: Earn from humble work and risky routes; unlock sites and level them up.
idlegold.ui.character_intro: Train body and instinct — stats multiply income in readable ways.
idlegold.ui.blacksmith_intro: Better gear multiplies every coin you earn. Weapon upgrades cost the most.
idlegold.source.village.name: Beg in the village
idlegold.source.village.desc: Copper clinks when kindness runs thin — still, it adds up.
idlegold.source.forest.name: Search the forest
idlegold.source.forest.desc: Forage where the trails fray; mushrooms, pouches, curious odds.
idlegold.source.cave.name: Explore the dark cave
idlegold.source.cave.desc: Cold air, old timber supports, and glints that might be ore.
idlegold.source.road.name: Collect road tolls
idlegold.source.road.desc: Not noble work — but caravans pay for dry boots and safe mile markers.
idlegold.log.welcome: You wake up broke but stubborn. Let the village hear your pitch.
